body.title: D-cross-day-session-boundary-2026-04-22
body.text:
# Decision rollup — D-cross-day-session-boundary-2026-04-22

**Closed at:** 2026-04-22T17:21:04.088001+00:00
**Ticket count:** 2 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-first-msg-of-day-close-prompt (S) — First message of new day prompts to close previous day's slate  `done` — stale_slate_check.py + 11 unit tests + /context-load Step 0.25 wiring. Soft-prompt when prior-day slate has open items without ✅ CLOSED marker. Commit 17d7d0ac.
- T-export-chat-per-message-date-routing (M) — export_chat.py: route each message to its own day-file (fix cross-day session bloat)  `done` — Per-message date routing + union-of-all-sessions rewrites. Fixed first-line-no-timestamp fallback-to-mtime bug. 16 unit tests. Idempotent by construction. Commit 571c91f6.

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: unknown.
